The above-mentioned Visa Fee should be paid in cash or by debit/credit card.

[Table:    Family Members of EU/EEA/CH citizens (applicants under the directive 2004/38/EC)]
Applicants applying at the Lithuania Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge (inclusive of Goods and Service Tax –SGST @9% and CGST@9%) payable in cash or by debit/credit card.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee  in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to  change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service  charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa application is applicable if you are traveling to visit family or friends, or if you are a family member (spouse/dependent) of a Lithuanian citizen. It's a short-term visa that can be granted for no more than 90 days
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa application is applicable if you are traveling to visit family or friends, or if you are a family member (spouse/dependent) of a Lithuanian citizen. It's a short-term visa that can be granted for no more than 90 days

## Visa Fees
Visa Fees applicable for Family Members of EU/EEA/CH citizens is:

[Table:    Family Members of EU/EEA/CH citizens (applicants under the directive 2004/38/EC)]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee should be paid in cash or by debit/credit card.
VFS Service charge:

[Table:    Family Members of EU/EEA/CH citizens (applicants under the directive 2004/38/EC)]
Applicants applying at the Lithuania Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge (inclusive of Goods and Service Tax –SGST @9% and CGST@9%) payable in cash or by debit/credit card.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee  in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to  change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service  charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/ind/en/ltu/travel-insurance).
Checklist
DATA PROTECTION (https://keliauk.urm.lt/en/entry-to-lithuania/information-on-the-processing-of-your-personal-data)
HARMONISED DOCUMENT LIST
List of Insurance companies

## Photo Specifications
Photographs
- The photograph must be in colour.
- It should have a white background.
- It should have a close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70-80% of the photograph.
- It should be in sharp focus and clean.
- It should be of high quality with no ink marks and creases.
- The photograph must show you looking directly at the camera.
- It should be 3.5 cm X 4.5 cm.
- It should show your skin tone naturally.
- It should have appropriate brightness and contrast.
- The photograph should be a recent one not more than 6 months old.
- It is to be taken without headgear.
- Photograph can be taken with headgear, after consideration on case to case basis if the applicant wears headgear on religious grounds. The main characteristics of the face must be apparent from the photograph. Chin, nose, eyes and eyebrows must not be covered; the forehead should be uncovered to the extent that the shape of the face is apparent.
- It should be without hat/cap.
- It should be without the applicant's hair tucked behind his/her ears.
- The photograph should not have any staple marks.
- Scanned and colour photocopies would NOT be accepted.

## Processing Time
Applications are processed within 15 calendar days from the day of arrival at the Embassy‘s visa section. In some cases, the processing time may be prolonged to 30 days.
Please note that if the application is submitted at a satellite center, it may take an additional 2-3 days in transit to New Delhi.

## Online Application Form
The Schengen visa application form should be filled in on the following website: https://www.migracija.lt/en/ (https://www.migracija.lt/en/). To access the application form, choose your nationality from the list, then select the Schengen visa application form and create your login.

visa_types.name: Visa Types
visa_types.overview:
If you are planning a short visit to Lithuania and you do not have Lithuanian nationality, you may need to apply for a Schengen visa. Lithuania is one of the 29 European countries forming the Schengen Area which have no border controls between them. These countries also issue a common visa, the Schengen visa.
Common Information Sheet for Schengen Visa applicants in India (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/66vA2jtRgrLty5L81WioWP/182d917124e2607cbac5583b9a0fa59d/common-information-sheet-rev-na.pdf)
visa_types.full_text:
If you are planning a short visit to Lithuania and you do not have Lithuanian nationality, you may need to apply for a Schengen visa. Lithuania is one of the 29 European countries forming the Schengen Area which have no border controls between them. These countries also issue a common visa, the Schengen visa.
Common Information Sheet for Schengen Visa applicants in India (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/66vA2jtRgrLty5L81WioWP/182d917124e2607cbac5583b9a0fa59d/common-information-sheet-rev-na.pdf)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Foreign nationals can apply for Schengen visa to travel for business purposes: to discuss with business representatives, participate in a scientific, educational, professional, or company meeting or conference, work out an estate or negotiate an agreement in Lithuania, when replying to invitations and requests from your partners in Lithuania, also attend or participate in trade fairs, seminars or conferences related to your professional activity.
visa_types.full_text:

Foreign nationals can apply for Schengen visa to travel for business purposes: to discuss with business representatives, participate in a scientific, educational, professional, or company meeting or conference, work out an estate or negotiate an agreement in Lithuania, when replying to invitations and requests from your partners in Lithuania, also attend or participate in trade fairs, seminars or conferences related to your professional activity.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Visa for a family member of EU/EEA/CH citizen who exercises the right of free movement.
If all the below mentioned conditions (1-3) are not fulfilled, visa application will be processed as a tourist or private visit (family/ friend) application. In this case, choose the correct checklist and submit the required documents accordingly.
- Union citizen exercises the right of free movement = Union citizen who moves to or resides in a Member State other than that of which he/she is a national.
- Applicant is a family member of the EU/EEA/CH citizen (spouse, partner in a registered relationship, child under 21 years of age or a direct relative in the ascending line dependent of a Union citizen or a spouse/partner).
- The EU/EEA/CH citizen’s journey and the family member’s journey are related to each other (= the visa applicant travels together with the EU/EEA/CH citizen or follow the citizen later).
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Visa for a family member of EU/EEA/CH citizen who exercises the right of free movement.
If all the below mentioned conditions (1-3) are not fulfilled, visa application will be processed as a tourist or private visit (family/ friend) application. In this case, choose the correct checklist and submit the required documents accordingly.
- Union citizen exercises the right of free movement = Union citizen who moves to or resides in a Member State other than that of which he/she is a national.
- Applicant is a family member of the EU/EEA/CH citizen (spouse, partner in a registered relationship, child under 21 years of age or a direct relative in the ascending line dependent of a Union citizen or a spouse/partner).
- The EU/EEA/CH citizen’s journey and the family member’s journey are related to each other (= the visa applicant travels together with the EU/EEA/CH citizen or follow the citizen later).

## Visa Fees

Please Note:

- The Visa fee and service  charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This is a special type of Schengen visa (C) allowing the seafarer to enter the Schengen area in order to board and disembark the vessel.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview

VFS Service charge:

[Table:    Family Members of EU/EEA/CH citizens (applicants under the directive 2004/38/EC)]
Applicants applying at the Lithuania Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge (inclusive of Goods and Service Tax –SGST @9% and CGST@9%) payable in cash or by debit/credit card.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee  in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to  change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service  charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/ind/en/ltu/travel-insurance).
Checklist
DATA PROTECTION (https://keliauk.urm.lt/en/entry-to-lithuania/information-on-the-processing-of-your-personal-data)
HARMONISED DOCUMENT LIST
List of Insurance companies

## Photo Specifications
Photographs
- The photograph must be in colour.
- It should have a white background.
- It should have a close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70-80% of the photograph.
- It should be in sharp focus and clean.
- It should be of high quality with no ink marks and creases.
- The photograph must show you looking directly at the camera.
- It should be 3.5 cm X 4.5 cm.
- It should show your skin tone naturally.
- It should have appropriate brightness and contrast.
- The photograph should be a recent one not more than 6 months old.
- It is to be taken without headgear.
- Photograph can be taken with headgear, after consideration on case to case basis if the applicant wears headgear on religious grounds. The main characteristics of the face must be apparent from the photograph. Chin, nose, eyes and eyebrows must not be covered; the forehead should be uncovered to the extent that the shape of the face is apparent.
- It should be without hat/cap.
- It should be without the applicant's hair tucked behind his/her ears.
- The photograph should not have any staple marks.
- Scanned and colour photocopies would NOT be accepted.

## Processing Time
Applications are processed within 15 calendar days from the day of arrival at the Embassy‘s visa section. In some cases, the processing time may be prolonged to 30 days.
Please note that if the application is submitted at a satellite center, it may take an additional 2-3 days in transit to New Delhi.

## Online Application Form
The Schengen visa application form should be filled in on the following website: https://www.migracija.lt/en/ (https://www.migracija.lt/en/). To access the application form, choose your nationality from the list, then select the Schengen visa application form and create your login.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Visa for the members of the official delegation of heads of State/ members of a national government invited for an official purpose.
Official delegation’s members who are Diplomatic passport holders travelling to Lithuania with diplomatic passport can stay in the territory of Lithuania for the maximum period of 90 (ninety) days within 6 (six) month (irrespective in the number of entries since the day of arrival). The period of 90 (ninety) days shall begin from the date of first entry to the Schengen Area.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Visa for the members of the official delegation of heads of State/ members of a national government invited for an official purpose.
Official delegation’s members who are Diplomatic passport holders travelling to Lithuania with diplomatic passport can stay in the territory of Lithuania for the maximum period of 90 (ninety) days within 6 (six) month (irrespective in the number of entries since the day of arrival). The period of 90 (ninety) days shall begin from the date of first entry to the Schengen Area.

## Visa Fees

visa_types.processing_time:
Foreign nationals can apply for Schengen visa to travel for short term study, training, research, or other types of internships: if third country national is admitted or registered at an educational establishment for the purpose of attending academic or vocational courses, trainings, research, etc.
Please note that if the application is submitted at a satellite center, it may take an additional 2-3 days in transit to New Delhi.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Foreign nationals can apply for Schengen visa to travel for short term study, training, research, or other types of internship: if third country national is admitted or registered at an educational establishment for the purpose of attending academic or vocational courses, trainings, research, etc.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Foreign nationals can apply for Schengen visa to travel for short term study, training, research, or other types of internship: if third country national is admitted or registered at an educational establishment for the purpose of attending academic or vocational courses, trainings, research, etc.

## Visa Fees
Visa Fees applicable for Family Members of EU/EEA/CH citizens is:

[Table:    Family Members of EU/EEA/CH citizens (applicants under the directive 2004/38/EC)]

- The Visa fee and service  charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

- It should be without hat/cap.
- It should be without the applicant's hair tucked behind his/her ears.
- The photograph should not have any staple marks.
- Scanned and colour photocopies would NOT be accepted.

## Processing Time
Foreign nationals can apply for Schengen visa to travel for short term study, training, research, or other types of internships: if third country national is admitted or registered at an educational establishment for the purpose of attending academic or vocational courses, trainings, research, etc.
Please note that if the application is submitted at a satellite center, it may take an additional 2-3 days in transit to New Delhi.

## Online Application Form
The Schengen visa application form should be filled in on the following website: https://www.migracija.lt/en/ (https://www.migracija.lt/en/). To access the application form, choose your nationality from the list, then select the Schengen visa application form and create your login.
